name: OpenTelemetry-to-EEOAP Adapter
description: A minimal local adapter package that transforms OpenTelemetry-style agent traces into EEOAP-compatible operation accountability statements. The package includes synthetic valid and invalid trace fixtures, generated EEOAP statements, adapter reports, scoped tests, and reproducibility documentation. This CodeMeta file is a local draft and is not final release metadata.
